seo.title: KlientBoost - Performance Marketing Agency 2026
seo.metaDesc: KlientBoost is a performance marketing agency that increases client ROI by an avg of 63% in the first 3 months. Get your free marketing plan.
seo.opengraphDescription: KlientBoost is a performance marketing agency that increases client ROI by an avg of 63% in the first 3 months. Get your free marketing plan.

sections.headerSub: Finally - a marketing agency with aggressive accountability & proactive obsession.

sections.headerTitle:
We Have More Success Stories
Than Other Agencies Have Clients
sections.headerSub: We help scrappy startups to massive brands, from straightforward products to ultra-complex services. See more case studies in your free marketing plan.

sections.headerTitle: <u>Performance Creative</u> So Good We Could Have a Netflix Series
sections.headerSub: Get award winning creative that’s proven to drive revenue & profit while scaling your efforts.

textBoxes.title: KPI % vs Time %
textBoxes.description: Goals dictate action. Tracking goal pace against time is the best way to see what type of action  (big or small) to take.

textBoxes.title: True Performance
textBoxes.description: If a service doesn't hit your goals, we'll remove it, no questions asked. We keep a healthy pressure on ourselves to do what's best for you. Always.

textBoxes.title: Goals Hit = Time To Scale
textBoxes.description: Let’s figure out where additional budget is best spent. Good thing we’re super proactive & already have the financial math ready for you.

sections.headerTitle:
Does Your Marketing Agency
Hit Goals, Consistently? Didn’t Think So
sections.headerSub: All our clients & all our services have business goals, and we’ll add more resources for free if we’re pacing behind. See how in your free marketing plan.

sections.headerTitle:
Financial Acumen So High, We Already
Know What’s Next For Your Growth
sections.headerSub: Meet our “Growth Grid” that takes your financial business metrics & attribution models to find where your current & next best dollars are spent. We do the math in your free marketing plan.

sections.headerTitle:
We Published The Recipe Book
Around Marketing Innovation
sections.headerSub: The only marketing kitchen that keeps producing the freshest, most innovate marketing recipes. See the latest recipes in your free marketing plan.

sections.headerTitle: We Tie Your <u>Financial Goals</u> To The Best Marketing Opportunities
sections.headerSub: Is your current budget allocation the best? Where should you spend your next dollar? We’ll show you in your free marketing plan.

textBoxes.title: Financial Data
textBoxes.description: Know cost ceilings & financial equations per marketing channel to hit your business goals.

textBoxes.title: Marketing Data
textBoxes.description: We'll analyze & show you what we'd do differently to achieve your goals.

textBoxes.title: Customer Success Data
textBoxes.description: What customer segments have the highest LTV and/or lowest churn?

textBoxes.title: Competitor Data
textBoxes.description: We'll show & track competitor moves so you'll be alerted about their strategy changes.

textBoxes.title: Market Data
textBoxes.description: What market tailwinds or headwinds influence your ability to grow? We'll track that too.

sections.headerTitle: The $10,000 <u>Marketing Plan 2.0</u> We’re Giving Away For Free
sections.headerSub: Get financial, competitor, strategic, & quick win analysis,  all tied to your biggest goals.

cta.label: See the incredible value that's in your free marketing plan

sections.headerTitle: Top 1% Marketers Who <u>Actually Give a S***,</u>  All Working Toward Your Growth
sections.headerSub: Meet the intrinsically motivated & goal driven team members. No wonder we're the only marketing agency to ever win Glassdoor's #1 best place to work.

sections.headerTitle: Our Software (Kite) Tracks, Alerts, & Helps <u>Achieve All Your Goals</u>
sections.headerSub: Meet Kite, our home-built software that tracks anomalies, performance bleeds, growth opportunities, and much much more, 24/7. We’ll show you in your free marketing plan.
